SHORT NAME: CLM_SITE_NTRL_PYMT_IPPS_AMT 

LONG NAME: CLM_SITE_NTRL_PYMT_IPPS_AMT 

TYPE: NUM 

LENGTH: 8 

SOURCE: NCH 

VALUES: — 

COMMENT: This field is derived by accumulating the amount field (CLM-SITE-NTRL-PMT-IPPS-AMT) that is present on 
any of the claim records included in the stay (i.e., sum of the CLM-SITE-NTRL-PMT-IPPS-AMT reported on 
the claims that comprised the LTCH stay). 

This field is new in 2015.
